loop1.title: Today's Energy
loop1.note: Showing aggregate energy volume (Active/Reactive/Total) for the last 7 days; target-based metrics (Target, Progress, SEC) are omitted as the asset's nameplate rating is unknown.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing active and reactive power trends over the last 7 days. Rated and Contracted power lines are omitted because the asset's nameplate ratings are unknown.

loop1.title: Input vs Output Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active power and derived efficiency/losses — per-phase power isn't measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Load Anomalies
loop1.note: Showing actual load trend and load factor — expected load, anomaly events, and threshold bands are not measured by this DG meter.
